WHATSAPP_CALL.PERMISSION_REQUESTED: Call permission request sent to the contact. You can call once they approve.
WHATSAPP_CALL.PERMISSION_PENDING: Waiting for the contact to approve the call permission request. Please try again shortly.
WHATSAPP_CALL.MIC_DENIED: Microphone access denied. Please allow mic access and try again.
WHATSAPP_CALL.PERMISSION_GRANTED: {contactName} approved the call permission request. You can now call them.
WHATSAPP_CALL.RELOAD_ENDED_CALL: The call ended because the page was refreshed.
